themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 9 verses. Commentary leans on "Jerome on Commentary on Ezekiel: (Verse 16, 17.) And he said to me: Son of man, behold, I wil...". Word-study detail reinforces "יַחְסְר֖וּ: That they may want - to lack; by implication, to fail, want, lessen".

10: Weigh out twenty shekels of food to eat each day...
11: Also measure out a sixth of a hin of water...
13: The Lord said, “In this way the people of Israel...
14: Then I said, “Not so, Sovereign Lord
17: for food and water will be scarce
